hypothesis: If a multi-stage AI-guided pipeline combining database mining, machine learning interatomic potential relaxation, and conditional generative modeling is applied to Li–Si–X chemical space, then it will identify and design novel silicon-based anode materials with theoretical capacities exceeding 1500 mAh/g and structurally stable lithium-ion migration channels, because the geometric stability of Li⁺ transport channels between charged and discharged states is a predictive criterion for electrochemical cycling performance that can be encoded as a generative design constraint.
